_comment: Example autofill payload for the `instagram-5slide-v1` variant. Keys MUST match the Bulk Create column names exactly (see sample-bulk-create.csv). Replace brand_template_id with the real value from templates.registry.jsonc.
title: AI OS — Launch Carousel

slide_1_headline.text: Your brand has an Operating System now

slide_1_body.text: Agents, skills, and automations that ship content while you sleep.

slide_2_body.text: Each agent owns a lane — content, research, ops — and hands off cleanly.

slide_3_body.text: Reusable capabilities like this Canva carousel generator, versioned and shared.

slide_4_body.text: Brief in, finished asset out. Every run makes the next one faster.

slide_5_body.text: One subscription. Every workflow. Built on OpenCode.
